name: 12" x 10" Moody Still Life Framed Wall Art Canvas - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description: The 12" x 10" Moody Still Life Framed Wall Art Canvas by Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee presents a digital print art piece featuring a moody still life table scape in neutral tones, giving an aesthetic appeal to your space. The gold frame comes with a convenient saw tooth back for effortless hanging. The horizontal orientation of this canvas infuses your room with a somber ambience. Add a timeless, dark vintage feel to your decor with this moody still life canvas from Threshold, a collaborative creation with Studio McGee.
